headlines.description: Hosts Russia got their World Cup off to a dream start with a thumping 5-0 victory over Saudi Arabia in Moscow.
headlines.shortLinkText: World Cup hosts Russia ease to victory

headlines.description: Jose Gimenez headed home late after a frustrating game in which Uruguay's star players, Luis Suarez and Edinson Cavani, had missed good chances.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gimenez secures Uruguay win, Salah benched

headlines.description: Iran won their first World Cup match since 1998 as a 95th-minute Aziz Bouhaddouz own goal gave them a 1-0 win over Morocco.
headlines.shortLinkText: Iran beat Morocco thanks to late own goal

headlines.description: Cristiano Ronaldo completed a hat trick with a perfectly taken free kick in the 88th minute to give Portugal a 3-3 draw against Spain on Friday at the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ronaldo scores hat trick, Portugal draws 3-3 with Spain

headlines.description: Technology twice helped France at the World Cup on Saturday in its 2-1 victory over Australia in Group C.
headlines.shortLinkText: Technology helps France beat gritty Australia 2-1 in Group C

headlines.description: Messi's chance came and went after 63 minutes when keeper Hannes Halldorsson guessed right to parry the spot-kick.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi penalty saved as Argentina are held

headlines.description: Yussuf Poulsen scored the only goal in the second half to give Denmark a 1-0 win over Peru, who earlier missed a penalty in their Group C opener on
headlines.shortLinkText: Denmark withstand Peru attack to earn slim win

headlines.description: Even in a more defensive role, Luka Modric can still lead the attack.
headlines.shortLinkText: Modric scores 1, sets up another as Croatia tops Nigeria 2-0

headlines.description: Superb strike enough for 1-0 win over Costa Rica in scrappy match at the Samara Arena.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kolarov free kick gives Serbia victory

headlines.description: Germany became the third defending champion in the last 16 years to lose its opening match at the World Cup, falling to Mexico 1-0 Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mexico beats defending champion Germany 1-0 at World Cup

headlines.description: Brazil joined the list of big teams struggling to win their opening matches at the World Cup in Russia.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brazil held to 1-1 draw by Switzerland at World Cup

headlines.description: Another video review led to a penalty at the World Cup, this time helping Sweden beat South Korea 1-0 Monday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sweden gets benefit of video review, beats South Korea 1-0

headlines.description: Belgium laboured for large periods but still ran out comfortable 3-0 winners against Panama in Sochi.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lukaku scores twice as Belgium ease past Panama

headlines.description: Harry Kane scored a dramatic stoppage-time winner as England beat Tunisia 2-1 in Volgograd.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane scores late winner for England vs. Tunisia

headlines.description: Yuya Osako had a surprise in store for those who thought the absence of Shinji Okazaki left Japan little hope of competing with Colombia at the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Japan tops Colombia 2-1 in latest World Cup surprise

headlines.description: Senegal defeated Group H favourites Poland 2-1 at the World Cup on Tuesday thanks to an own goal and and a controversial second strike.
headlines.shortLinkText: Controversial goal helps Senegal surprise Poland

headlines.description: Free-scoring Russia's World Cup dream continued with an emphatic 3-1 victory over Egypt in their second Group A match in St. Petersburg on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Russia ease past Egypt as knockouts near

headlines.description: Cristiano Ronaldo scored his fourth goal in two World Cup matches as Portugal won 1-0 against a Morocco side that created plenty of chances.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ronaldo strikes again as Morocco go out

headlines.description: Uruguay booked their place in the knockout stage with a 1-0 victory over Saudi Arabia in Rostov on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Uruguay into knockouts with win; Russia too

headlines.description: Diego Costa scored on a deflection to lead Spain to a 1-0 win over Iran on Wednesday at the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Diego Costa scores again, Spain beats Iran 1-0 at World Cup

headlines.description: Mile Jedinak scored from a penalty given after a VAR review as Australia came from a goal down to draw 1-1 with Denmark.
headlines.shortLinkText: Australia salvage draw with VAR-awarded penalty

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappe's first World Cup goal put France into the round of 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappe sends France into 2nd round with 1-0 win over Peru

headlines.description: Lionel Messi and his Argentina teammates are on the verge of World Cup elimination. Croatia is moving on.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi, Argentina beaten 3-0 at World Cup, Croatia advances

headlines.description: Philippe Coutinho and Neymar scored injury-time goals to help Brazil beat Costa Rica 2-0 Friday at the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brazil scores late goals to beat Costa Rica 2-0 at World Cup

headlines.description: Ahmed Musa scored two superb goals as Nigeria jump-started their World Cup campaign with a 2-0 win over Iceland in Group D on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Musa's two goals boost Nigeria over Iceland

headlines.description: Xherdan Shaqiri scored a late winner to help Switzerland stun Serbia 2-1 in their second Group E game on Friday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Shaqiri sends Switzerland to dramatic late win

headlines.description: FIFA World Cup
headlines.shortLinkText: Lukaku, Hazard braces lead Belgium over Tunisia

headlines.description: Carlos Vela and Javier Hernandez scored a goal each to move Mexico closer to a spot in the round of 16 by beating South Korea 2-1 Saturday at the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mexico wins again at World Cup, beats South Korea 2-1

headlines.description: Toni Kroos scored in the fifth minute of stoppage time from outside the penalty area, and 10-man Germany rallied to beat Sweden 2-1 on Saturday to stay alive at the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kroos scores late to give Germany 2-1 win over Sweden

headlines.description: FIFA World Cup
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane hat trick keys England romp vs. Panama

headlines.description: Japan and Senegal played out an entertaining 2-2 draw in Group H which leaves both with work to do to qualify in their final matches.
headlines.shortLinkText: Honda off bench to earn Japan draw with Senegal

headlines.description: Radamel Falcao's first World Cup goal led Colombia to a 3-0 victory over Poland on Sunday and kept the team in the running for a spot in the knockout round.
headlines.shortLinkText: Falcao scores, Colombia beats Poland 2-1 at World Cup

headlines.description: Saudi Arabia scored a dramatic 95th-minute winner to beat Egypt 2-1 and finish their World Cup campaign on a high in Volgograd.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salah scores but Saudi Arabia beat Egypt 2-1

headlines.description: Luis Suarez and Edinson Cavani scored a goal each and Uruguay went on to defeat Russia 3-0 on Monday, finishing undefeated in group play and handing the host nation its first loss of the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Suarez scores again and Uruguay downs host Russia 3-0

headlines.description: Cristiano Ronaldo's missed penalty cost Portugal first place in its World Cup group on Monday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ronaldo misses penalty, Portugal draws 1-1 with Iran

headlines.description: Morocco were denied a shock World Cup win against Spain in their Group B finale on Monday when VAR overturned a late offside call in a 2-2 draw.
headlines.shortLinkText: VAR ruling sees Spain level late vs. Morocco

headlines.description: Already-eliminated Peru ended Australia's hopes of advancing to the knockout round at the World Cup with a 2-0 victory on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Australia eliminated, Peru leaves World Cup on high note

headlines.description: France and Denmark played out the first 0-0 draw of the World Cup at the Luzhniki Stadium as both teams progressed.
headlines.shortLinkText: France, Denmark through after dull 0-0 draw

headlines.description: FIFA World Cup
headlines.shortLinkText: Croatia win Group D after win vs. Iceland

headlines.description: Lionel Messi and Argentina finally came alive at the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi, Argentina come alive, beat Nigeria 2-1 at World Cup

headlines.description: Sweden dominated Mexico 3-0 to move on to the World Cup knockout round, and thanks to South Korea, Mexico will also advance.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sweden blanks Mexico 3-0, but both head to knockout round

headlines.description: Germany is out of the World Cup, the fourth defending champion in the last five tournaments to be eliminated in the group stage.
headlines.shortLinkText: Defending champion Germany eliminated from World Cup

headlines.description: Brazil qualified for the knockout stage as Group E winners with a 2-0 victory over Serbia in Moscow on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brazil top Group E with Serbia win; Mexico next

headlines.description: Switzerland has qualified for the round of 16 at the World Cup despite twice losing the lead in a 2-2 draw with Costa Rica, which had already been eliminated.
headlines.shortLinkText: Switzerland and Costa Rica draw 2-2; Swiss advance

headlines.description: Japan advanced to the knockout round at the World Cup on a tiebreaker, fewer yellow cards than Senegal.
headlines.shortLinkText: Japan advances on yellow cards despite losing at World Cup

headlines.description: Colombia defeated Senegal 1-0 to advance to the World Cup round of 16 as Group H winners in a result that sent the African side out on fair play.
headlines.shortLinkText: Colombia win; Senegal out on fair play

headlines.description: In a match neither team had to win, Belgium came out on top and took first place in its World Cup group with a 1-0 victory over England on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Belgium beats England 1-0, moves into tougher side of draw

headlines.description: FIFA World Cup
headlines.shortLinkText: Tunisia top Panama for third place in Group G

headlines.description: Teenager Kylian Mbappe scored two goals in a five-minute span to lead France over Argentina 4-3 Saturday and into the World Cup quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappe, not Messi, stars as France beats Argentina 4-3

headlines.description: Edinson Cavani scored twice and Cristiano Ronaldo none, giving Uruguay a 2-1 victory over Portugal on Saturday at the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cavani scores twice, Uruguay ousts Ronaldo and Portugal 2-1

headlines.description: Russia shockingly eliminated Spain from the World Cup, surviving two hours of dominance by the 2010 champions in a 1-1 draw and then winning a penalty shootout 4-3.
headlines.shortLinkText: Russia defeats Spain in shootout at World Cup

headlines.description: Both teams had scored their goals in an astonishing first four minutes.
headlines.shortLinkText: Croatia see off Denmark in shootout drama

headlines.description: Neymar flaunted his flair and his theatrics with a goal and an assist Monday to lead Brazil into the quarterfinals at the World Cup with a 2-0 victory over Mexico.
headlines.shortLinkText: Neymar leads Brazil into World Cup quarterfinals

headlines.description: Nacer Chaldi capped a comeback from a two-goal deficit when he scored in the fourth minute of injury time to give Belgium a 3-2 victory over Japan on Monday and a spot in the World Cup quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Belgium beats Japan 3-2 to reach World Cup quarterfinals

headlines.description: The heir to Zlatan Ibrahimovic finally delivered for Sweden at the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Forsberg delivers, Sweden reaches World Cup quarterfinals

headlines.description: England ended its long run of penalty misery and reached the World Cup quarterfinals for the first time in 12 years, beating Colombia 4-3 in a shootout on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: England finally wins penalty shootout at World Cup

headlines.description: Antoine Griezmann's fluke goal helped France earn a place in the World Cup semifinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: France reaches World Cup semifinals, beats Uruguay 2-0

headlines.description: Belgium reached the World Cup semifinals for the first time in 32 years by holding off five-time champion Brazil 2-1 Friday, sending Neymar home without living up to the expectations of being soccer's most expensive player.
headlines.shortLinkText: Belgium eliminates Brazil from World Cup, wins 2-1

headlines.description: England achieved something David Beckham's generation never managed: It reached the semifinals of the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: England reaches World Cup semifinals, beats Sweden 2-0

headlines.description: Croatia won a second consecutive penalty shootout 4-3 to advance to the World Cup semifinals, ending the tournament for hosts Russia.
headlines.shortLinkText: Croatia oust Russia on penalties to reach semis

headlines.description: France advanced to the World Cup final for the first time since 2006 with a 1-0 win over Belgium on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: France advances to World Cup final, beats Belgium 1-0

headlines.description: Croatia is going to its first World Cup final.
headlines.shortLinkText: Croatia reaches World Cup for 1st time, beats England 2-1

headlines.description: Belgium earned its highest World Cup finish on Saturday by beating England 2-0 in the third-place match.
headlines.shortLinkText: Belgium finishes 3rd at World Cup, beats England 2-0

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappe and France put on a thrilling show in winning the World Cup title. All Russian President Vladimir Putin might remember is the Pussy Riot protest.
headlines.shortLinkText: France wins 2nd World Cup title, beats Croatia 4-2
